title: Bad doctor - not
content:
Most of the time, the doctors and the nurses are doing their best to help the patients. However, many patients just refuse to take what is best for them and instead demand something else that might cause more harm than good.

And many of those patients will go out and complain about how terrible the service they had received from the hospital.

I saw it first hand today ... and I will think twice next time I heard about bad doctor/hospital treatment.
